title: Visionary Business Plan
scenario: Develop a 1-page business plan for a small startup. Include a brief summary of the business, target market, unique selling proposition, goals, and key partners. Use a standard business plan template and be concise.

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the tone is professional and optimistic
Verify if the business plan meets the word count and formatting constraints
Evaluate if the business plan includes all required sections and is coherent
